ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code representing the player's country of origin */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "career_titles" INTEGER /* Total career titles won by the player */,
  "career_finals" INTEGER /* Total career finals played by the player */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the given date */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the players table */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the player on the given date */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament (e.g., ATP, WTA, Grand Slam) */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., singles, doubles, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_code" TEXT /* Code for the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type (e.g., hard, clay, grass) */,
  "prize_money" INTEGER /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament in the tournaments table */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match (e.g., first round, quarterfinals) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first player in the players table */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second player in the players table */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 6-0, 6-0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the players table */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., aces, double faults, wins) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user in the users table */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view rankings, edit statistics) */,
  "permission_value" TEXT /* Value of the permission (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
